scenarios.description: child(0) on element with no child nodes throws IndexOutOfBoundsException (childNodeSize()==0 branch)
scenarios.precondition: Element el = new Element("div"); // no children
pseudocode: TEST TC01 child on empty element

scenarios.description: child(0) returns the single child element (one-element list branch)
scenarios.expectedResult: return value is the only child Element with tagName "p"
pseudocode: TEST TC02 child on single child

scenarios.description: child(1) on element with multiple element children returns second element (filtered list size>1)
scenarios.precondition: Element el = new Element("div"); Element a = el.appendElement("a"); Element span = el.appendElement("span");
scenarios.expectedResult: return value is the second child Element with tagName "span"
pseudocode: TEST TC03 child on two children

scenarios.description: child(1) ignores non-element nodes: one TextNode then one Element and returns Element at filtered index 0
scenarios.precondition: Element el = new Element("div"); el.appendText("text"); Element c = el.appendElement("c");
scenarios.expectedResult: return value is the child Element with tagName "c" at filtered index 0
pseudocode: TEST TC04 child with mixed nodes

scenarios.description: child(2) with two element children throws IndexOutOfBoundsException (filtered list length=2, index=2)
scenarios.precondition: Element el = new Element("div"); el.appendElement("x"); el.appendElement("y");
pseudocode: TEST TC05 child index equal size

scenarios.description: child(-1) on element with one element child throws IndexOutOfBoundsException (negative index)
child(0) on element with non-element children only throws IndexOutOfBoundsException (filtered empty)
scenarios.expectedResult: throws IndexOutOfBoundsException; no Elements in childElementsList
pseudocode: TEST TC07 child with only text child
